label: Docking (Non-Target)
description: Docks lead compounds against the non-target protein structure to assess selectivity. Lower |ΔG| values compared to the primary target confirm on-target selectivity.

defaultInputs.name: Compound List
defaultInputs.tooltip: Lead compounds from the primary bioactivity filter.

defaultInputs.name: Non-Target Protein Structure
defaultInputs.tooltip: 3D structure of the non-target protein for docking.

defaultOutputs.name: Docked Structure
defaultOutputs.tooltip: 3D docked complex (PDB) with the non-target protein.

defaultOutputs.name: ΔG (kcal/mol)
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Predicted binding free energy against the non-target. Values closer to 0 indicate low off-target affinity.

configSchema.label: Docking Engine
configSchema.tooltip: Docking engine to use for non-target selectivity assessment.
